LANGUAGE_SELECT.en:
Welcome to Fahamu Shamba
Choose your language:
1. English
2. Kiswahili
3. Dholuo

Karibu Fahamu Shamba
Chagua lugha yako:
1. Kiingereza
2. Kiswahili
3. Dholuo
LANGUAGE_SELECT.luo:
Oyie gi Fahamu Shamba

1. Englis
2. Kiswahili
3. Dholuo

THANK_YOU.en: Thank you! Visit fahamu-shamba.com for more.

INVALID_INPUT.luo: Dwoko ma ok nyal. Tem odiechiengʼ.

REGISTER_SUCCESS.en: Account created! Check SMS for details.
REGISTER_SUCCESS.sw: Akaunti ilitengenezwa! Angalia SMS kwa maelezo.

GOODBYE.en: Goodbye! Dial *123# again to use Fahamu Shamba.
GOODBYE.sw: Kwaheri! Piga *123# tena kulingana Fahamu Shamba.
GOODBYE.luo: Kwaheri! Piga *123# tena mondo igichako Fahamu Shamba.

SESSION_TIMEOUT.en: Session expired. Dial *123# to start over.
SESSION_TIMEOUT.luo: Seshan to pile. Piga *123# mondo dhi chakre.

ERROR_MESSAGE.en: An error occurred. Please try again.
